touches.ai_summary: Outbound LinkedIn message sent to Mateo Wang introducing AskElephant's onboarding automation capabilities. No response received.
Follow-up LinkedIn message to Mateo. He responded expressing interest in learning more about how we differ from their current evaluation of Fireflies.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform compare to Fireflies for onboarding use cases?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained AskElephant's specialized onboarding automation features and suggested a brief call to discuss their specific needs.

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with calendar link and ROI framework for onboarding automation. Mateo replied confirming interest and sharing that their CS team is struggling with manual onboarding tasks.

questions_asked.question: Do you have case studies from PropTech companies?
questions_asked.answer: Rep shared two relevant case studies and confirmed PropTech-specific integrations.

touches.ai_summary: Pre-call email with discovery agenda and questions about their current onboarding workflow. Mateo confirmed the agenda and mentioned they're also evaluating Fireflies but haven't made a decision.

Discovery call with Mateo covering current onboarding pain points. CoralDigital manually onboards 15-20 new property management clients monthly. Mateo owns CS but mentioned needing buy-in from leadership eventually. Discussed team size (21 CS reps) and automation goals.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM and property management systems?
questions_asked.answer: Rep confirmed API integrations with major PropTech platforms and offered technical validation session.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Rep outlined 4-6 week implementation with dedicated onboarding support.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Mateo said he can drive the decision for his team but may need CFO approval for budget.

objections: We're currently looking at Fireflies which seems more affordable

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up call to review ROI calculator results. Discussed projected time savings of 180 hours/month across the CS team. Mateo engaged but noted budget constraints and that Fireflies quoted lower pricing.

questions_asked.question: Can you match Fireflies pricing?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained value differentiation and offered to explore flexible terms after technical validation.

questions_asked.question: What's your budget range for this initiative?
questions_asked.answer: Mateo indicated $15-18K annually but needs to stay competitive with other quotes.

touches.ai_summary: Call to schedule technical evaluation and discuss success metrics. Mateo confirmed key stakeholders (himself and two senior CS managers). No mention of executive involvement.

questions_asked.question: Will your CTO or VP of Operations join the technical review?
questions_asked.answer: Mateo said he can handle the technical evaluation with his team and doesn't think exec involvement is needed yet.

next_steps: Technical eval scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call diving deeper into workflow automation requirements. Discussed specific onboarding steps, document generation needs, and client communication automation. Mateo detailed their current Fireflies trial limitations.

questions_asked.question: How does your automation handle complex conditional workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Rep demonstrated workflow builder with PropTech-specific templates.

questions_asked.question: What level of customization is available without engineering resources?
questions_asked.answer: Rep showed no-code configuration options and offered pilot setup support.

questions_asked.question: When do you need this solution implemented?
questions_asked.answer: Mateo indicated Q2 timeline to improve onboarding before busy season.

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session with Mateo and two CS managers. Walked through API integrations, data security, and automation capabilities. Team engaged and asked detailed technical questions. Compared features directly to Fireflies functionality.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle data privacy for client information in automated workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Rep covered SOC2 compliance, encryption standards, and data residency options.

questions_asked.question: Can we build custom automation templates for our specific property types?
questions_asked.answer: Rep demonstrated template builder and offered to create three custom templates during implementation.

questions_asked.question: What's the learning curve for our team to manage automations independently?
questions_asked.answer: Rep outlined training program and ongoing support model.

objections: Fireflies integrates directly with our video platform, will this work with our setup?

touches.ai_summary: Product demo showcasing end-to-end onboarding automation for a sample PropTech client. Mateo and team impressed with workflow visualization and reporting capabilities. Discussed pricing and Mateo requested formal proposal.

questions_asked.question: Can we start with a smaller team and scale up?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained seat-based pricing model and confirmed ability to add seats quarterly.

questions_asked.question: Are you evaluating any other solutions besides Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Mateo confirmed Fireflies is the main alternative but AskElephant has stronger automation features.

touches.ai_summary: Extended technical validation session covering advanced use cases, reporting analytics, and integration testing with CoralDigital's staging environment. Team tested automation builders hands-on. Mateo confirmed technical fit and readiness to move forward pending pricing approval.

questions_asked.question: How do analytics compare to what Fireflies offers?
questions_asked.answer: Rep demonstrated advanced reporting dashboard with CS-specific metrics Fireflies doesn't provide.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we exceed our automation limits?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained unlimited automation tier included in enterprise plan.

questions_asked.question: What's your decision timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Mateo indicated 2-3 weeks to finalize vendor selection and budget approval.

touches.ai_summary: Brief call to present proposal. Mateo reviewed pricing and expressed concern about being above budget compared to Fireflies. Call cut short due to conflicting meeting.
objections: Your pricing is significantly higher than Fireflies, need to see if we can justify the difference

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with ROI justification and pricing comparison showing total cost of ownership. Highlighted features not available in Fireflies. Mateo responded asking if there's flexibility on pricing.

questions_asked.question: Is there any room to negotiate on the annual price?
questions_asked.answer: Rep offered to discuss creative terms and multi-year options to reduce Year 1 cost.

touches.ai_summary: Email with revised pricing options including volume discount and extended payment terms. Mateo confirmed he's reviewing with his manager and will need to present to CFO soon.

Meeting with Mateo positioned as exec alignment session, but no executives attended. Mateo presented business case and confirmed he has verbal approval from his director. Discussed implementation timeline and contract terms. Rep attempted to schedule follow-up with CFO or VP level.

questions_asked.question: Can we schedule 15 minutes with your CFO to address any final budget questions?
questions_asked.answer: Mateo said he can handle budget approval through his chain and doesn't think CFO time is necessary.

questions_asked.question: Who ultimately signs off on contracts of this size?
questions_asked.answer: Mateo indicated his VP of Operations signs but he can route the paperwork.

touches.ai_summary: Email with contract draft and requesting confirmation on final pricing approval. Mateo responded that they need to come down to match competitive pressure from Fireflies to move forward this quarter.
next_steps: Pricing call to discuss final terms

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call. Mateo pushed for 30% discount to match Fireflies. Rep explained value gap and offered 20% discount ($18,900 to $15,900) conditional on Q2 close. Mateo non-committal but said he'd review.

questions_asked.question: If we meet at $15,900 can you commit this week?
questions_asked.answer: Mateo said he needs to verify budget and will confirm but seems achievable.

objections: Fireflies is offering a significantly lower price for similar functionality
next_steps: Mateo to confirm by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Final pricing call to close terms. Mateo confirmed $15,900 works for his budget and he can get approval to move forward. Discussed contract terms, implementation kickoff timeline, and training schedule. No executive involvement confirmed. Mateo to send signed contract by Friday.

questions_asked.question: Should we include your VP of Operations on the kickoff call?
questions_asked.answer: Mateo said he'll handle the kickoff with his CS team and loop in leadership later if needed.

questions_asked.question: Can we include a 30-day out clause in case Fireflies launches a competing feature?
questions_asked.answer: Rep agreed to standard 30-day termination clause after initial 90-day period.
